rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score (4/10) and rest on the same three substantive points: strong general SWE experience and entrepreneurial background as strengths, offset by shallow AI expertise, no advanced AI degree, and no Director-level strategic leadership. The wording differs ('very recent, implementation-level work' vs 'recent short stint'), but this tracks the candidate's AI experience, not the career-gap dates, and falls within ordinary run-to-run rephrasing. Neither evaluation introduces a new concern, age inference, or penalty tied to the changed gap end date.
